allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add Phase 2: Providers and Users Management

New Features:
- Providers CRUD module with search functionality
- Users management with role filtering and password reset
- Enhanced user tracking (created_by, updated_by, password_changed_at)

Backend Changes:
- New API endpoints for providers (/api/providers/admin)
- New API endpoints for users management (/api/users/admin)
- Database schema updates (providers table, users enhancements)

Frontend Changes:
- Providers.js: Complete CRUD interface with search
- Users.js: User management with role filtering, tabs, password reset
- Updated App.js with new routes
- Updated Layout.js with Phase 2 menu items (Proveedores, Usuarios)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add Phase 4 Frontend: Operations Module UI

Frontend Components:
- ControlSamples.js: Full CRUD interface for control samples
  - Multi-analyte values management with dynamic forms
  - Support for numeric/alphanumeric data types
  - Reference values with upper/lower limits
  - Program filtering and search functionality
  - View dialog with detailed information
  
- ShipmentsAdmin.js: Enhanced shipments management
  - Create shipments with control sample association
  - Date range validation (shipment date and max reception date)
  - Generate report button (appears after reception date)
  - Regenerate report functionality
  - Visual indicators for report status

Navigation Updates:
- Added "Muestras Control" menu item (admin only)
- Updated "Envío de Resultados" to admin route
- New routes in App.js for both components

Features:
- Dynamic analyte value rows with add/remove
- Principle selection per analyte value
- Automatic date-based report generation availability
- Real-time validation and error handling
- Responsive design with Material-UI

Complete Phase 4 (Operations Module) now deployed!

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
